problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Combining Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
